creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu  7 jui 07 at 8:30:22 +0200, Martin Wilke <miwi@FreeBSD.org>
 wrote:
> Synopsis: New port: math/vtk5
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Thu Jun 7 06:28:17 UTC 2007
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Hi, The port does not build. Can you take a look in it?

I worked on VTK 5 with Frederic Petit some months ago, but I have
never finished its slave ports.

If that could help, the thread was

<http://www.mail-archive.com/freebsd-ports@freebsd.org/msg04770.html>

and the port is still at

<http://people.freebsd.org/~thierry/ports/vtk5.tgz>

Remark: this should be repocopied from math/vtk.

Regards,
-- 
Th. Thomas.
